steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage states 'The Crown of Columbus' is set largely on a Caribbean island, outside Ojibwe communities. The correct answer must be directly supported by — and only by — what the passage says.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: adds information not stated in the passage. ✗
  • Choice B: states the novel is not set in a rural Ojibwe community — directly supported by the passage's description of a Caribbean island setting. ✓
  • Choice C: introduces a claim not supported by the passage. ✗
  • Choice D: asserts something the passage does not establish. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
